title: Nosotros los pobres
writer: Carlos González Dueñas, Ismael Rodríguez, Pedro de Urdimalas
actors: Pedro Infante, Evita Muñoz 'Chachita', Carmen Montejo
plot: Nosotros Los Pobres stars Pedro Infante as a carpenter whose entire family must work together to clear his name after he is charged with a murder..
